body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
It's time for our regularly-scheduled ClimaAtmos.jl release. This one will be a minor release because of changes to the cache that are accessed from ClimaCoupler.jl (e.g. in [this PR](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/3465) with this [failing Coupler downstream test](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/actions/runs/12186251235/job/33994329593))
title: tag v0.28.0

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Closes #3482. I set water conservation to zero for the dry model. I think it's fine, but I can modify it if people prefer not to have water conservation for the dry model.

title: fix conservation check for dry model
Add topography option to support Hughes2023 double-mountain config
